field.label: GitHub Mirror
field.help: Optional URL prefix used to accelerate GitHub downloads, e.g. https://ghproxy.com/.

field.label: GitHub Token
field.help: Optional Personal Access Token used to raise GitHub API rate limits to 5000/h.

field.label: Auto Update Dashboard UI
field.help: Automatically update the embedded Dashboard UI monthly.

field.label: Auto Update Mihomo Core
field.help: Automatically update the Mihomo binary. NOT recommended — kernel updates can break connectivity.

field.label: Health Check URL
field.help: Used by the Dashboard Health Check button.

field.label: Health Check Timeout (ms)
field.help: Per-node timeout for the health check.

field.label: Backup before Override save
field.help: Auto create a backup snapshot every time Override is saved.

field.label: Backup before Profile activation
field.help: Auto create a backup snapshot every time a Profile is activated.
